creator: ed@fxq.nl
text:
Hello,

The patch has been updated, the old version didn't initialize the flags
field in fuser_desc structures, causing some flags to be spuriously set.

	http://g-rave.nl/junk/freebsd-fstat-fuser-posix.diff

-- 
 Ed Schouten <ed@fxq.nl>
 WWW: http://g-rave.nl/

PS: What's taking so long?
